vertical: Supplier compliance & contractor safety SaaS — industrial enterprise (oil & gas, utilities, construction)
campaign_name: Tier-2 Supplier Re-Engagement — Compliance Lapse → Renewal
objective: Reactivate Tier-2 supplier accounts whose compliance verification lapsed in the last 90 days, route engaged accounts to AE-qualified pipeline, and recover ~12% of dormant ARR within one quarter.

segment.name: Tier-2 Supplier Re-Engagement — Compliance Lapse → Renewal
warehouse_traits: compliance_events.verification_expiry_date BETWEEN now() - interval '90 days' AND now()

touches.timing: Day 0 — 9:00 AM recipient local time, Tuesday or Wednesday send-day only
touches.subject: {{contact.first_name}}, your {{account.compliance_program_name}} verification expired {{compliance.days_since_expiry}} days ago
touches.body_brief: Open with a direct, non-alarmist compliance status alert: {{account.name}}'s supplier verification under {{account.compliance_program_name}} lapsed {{compliance.days_since_expiry}} days ago. Cite the specific hiring client(s) ({{account.linked_hiring_client_names}}) whose active contracts now flag {{account.name}} as unverified — making them non-compliant too. State the exact renewal path: one-click to the Veriforce Renewal Portal pre-populated with {{account.name}}'s profile. Include a secondary CTA to schedule a 15-min guided renewal call. Tone: factual urgency, zero scare tactics. Footer: account manager name {{ae.full_name}} and direct calendar link {{ae.calendar_link}}.
qa_rules: Suppress if Contact.HasOptedOutOfEmail = true at send time (real-time re-check)
Suppress if Account.Active_AE_Opportunity__c = true at send time
Suppress if Account.Has_Open_Critical_Case__c = true OR Account.Has_Open_High_Case__c = true
Hard-block send if compliance.days_since_expiry token resolves to null or <= 0
Hard-block send if account.linked_hiring_client_names token resolves to null or empty string
Deduplicate: one send per Account within 24-hour window; suppress duplicate contacts on same account
Spam-gate: subject line length must not exceed 70 characters after token resolution
Validate renewal_portal.prefill_url is a live URL (HTTP 200) before send
touches.success_metric: Email open rate ≥ 32%; renewal portal CTA click rate ≥ 8% within 48 hours of send

touches.timing: Day 3 — triggered on next login session detected post-Step 1; expires after 7 days if no login
touches.subject: Complete your compliance renewal — {{account.compliance_program_name}} verification is overdue
touches.body_brief: Persistent top-of-screen banner displayed immediately upon authenticated login to the Veriforce portal. Banner copy: 'Your {{account.compliance_program_name}} verification has been expired for {{compliance.days_since_expiry}} days. {{account.linked_hiring_client_count}} of your hiring clients require active verification. Renew now to restore compliant status.' Primary CTA button: 'Renew Now → ' linking to {{renewal_portal.prefill_url}}. Secondary dismissible link: 'Remind me in 3 days.' If user dismisses, re-surface at next login. Track banner impression, CTA click, and dismissal events separately.
qa_rules: Suppress banner if renewal has been completed (compliance.verification_status = 'Active') at session start
Suppress banner if Account.Active_AE_Opportunity__c = true
Suppress if account.linked_hiring_client_count token resolves to 0 or null — escalate to data team
Ensure banner does not stack with any other active system alert banners (max one banner at a time rule)
Validate compliance.days_since_expiry is a positive integer at render time
Banner must not render for contacts tagged Contact.Role__c = 'Technical / IT' only — compliance owner targeting required
touches.success_metric: In-app banner CTA click rate ≥ 18% of sessions where banner is rendered; renewal flow initiation ≥ 10%

touches.timing: Day 7 — create AE task if Step 1 email was opened OR Step 2 banner was clicked but no renewal initiated; skip if renewal completed
touches.subject: [ACTION] Re-engage {{account.name}} — compliance lapsed {{compliance.days_since_expiry}} days, hiring client risk: {{account.linked_hiring_client_names}}
touches.body_brief: Create a high-priority Salesforce Task on the Account record assigned to {{ae.full_name}}. Task description: '{{account.name}} (Tier-2 Supplier) has shown re-engagement signals (email open / banner click) but has not initiated renewal. Compliance verification under {{account.compliance_program_name}} expired {{compliance.days_since_expiry}} days ago. Linked hiring clients at risk: {{account.linked_hiring_client_names}}. Recommended action: personal outreach — call or LinkedIn — within 24 hours. Reference compliance gap, offer white-glove renewal assist. Estimated ARR at risk: {{account.arr_at_risk}}. Attach renewal portal prefill link: {{renewal_portal.prefill_url}}. Log outcome in Opportunity.Stage__c.' Set Task.Priority = High, Task.ActivityDate = today + 1 business day.
qa_rules: Do not create task if Account.Active_AE_Opportunity__c = true (AE already engaged)
Do not create task if renewal has been completed prior to Day 7
Do not create task if Account.Has_Open_Critical_Case__c = true — route to CSM instead
Validate ae.full_name resolves to an active Salesforce User (User.IsActive = true); if AE seat is vacant, assign to CSM queue
Ensure account.arr_at_risk token is not null; if null, substitute with 'ARR data unavailable — check billing system'
Deduplicate: no more than one open re-engagement Task per Account at a time
touches.success_metric: AE task completion rate ≥ 70% within 48 hours of creation; AE-logged outreach attempt rate ≥ 85%

touches.timing: Day 14 — send at 10:00 AM recipient local time; optimization agent selects variant based on Day 0 engagement signal
touches.subject: Variant A (low-engagement cohort): '{{contact.first_name}}, {{account.linked_hiring_client_names}} may be required to find a new verified supplier' | Variant B (engaged cohort): '{{contact.first_name}}, here's everything you need to complete your {{account.compliance_program_name}} renewal in under 10 minutes'
touches.body_brief: VARIANT A (accounts with zero opens/clicks in Steps 1–2, churn_risk_score ≥ 75): Lead with consequence framing — hiring clients ({{account.linked_hiring_client_names}}) are contractually obligated to use verified suppliers; an unresolved lapse of {{compliance.days_since_expiry}} days may trigger a mandatory supplier swap. Include a peer social proof stat: 'Over {{industry.avg_reactivation_benchmark}}% of Tier-2 suppliers in {{account.industry_vertical}} renew within 30 days of lapse.' Hard CTA: 'Restore Verified Status Now' → {{renewal_portal.prefill_url}}. VARIANT B (accounts with open or click in Steps 1–2, churn_risk_score < 75): Lead with frictionless enablement — step-by-step renewal checklist pre-populated for {{account.name}}. Highlight: estimated time to complete = {{renewal.estimated_minutes}} minutes. Show progress indicator based on {{renewal.steps_already_completed}}. CTA: 'Pick Up Where You Left Off' → {{renewal_portal.prefill_url}}. Both variants close with AE offer: '{{ae.full_name}} is available if you need any help — {{ae.calendar_link}}'.
qa_rules: Suppress if renewal completed before Day 14 send (real-time compliance status check)
Suppress if Account.Active_AE_Opportunity__c = true
Suppress if Contact.HasOptedOutOfEmail = true
Optimization agent must confirm variant assignment is logged in warehouse before send executes
Hard-block Variant A send if account.linked_hiring_client_names is null — fallback to Variant B
Hard-block if industry.avg_reactivation_benchmark token resolves outside range 40–95 (data anomaly gate)
Hard-block if renewal.estimated_minutes resolves to null or > 60 — review renewal workflow data
Spam-gate: combined subject + preheader must not trigger spam keywords list (run through internal filter before send)
Deduplicate: suppress contacts who received Step 1 email AND did not open — consider SMS escalation instead (flag for optimization agent review)
touches.success_metric: Variant B click-to-renewal-initiation rate ≥ 15%; Variant A click rate ≥ 6%; optimization agent to declare winning variant by Day 16 for cohort reallocation

touches.timing: Day 21 — send LinkedIn message for accounts with zero renewal initiation across all prior touches and churn_risk_score ≥ 70; send between 8:00–10:00 AM recipient local time, weekdays only
touches.subject: Personal outreach: compliance verification window closing for {{account.name}}
touches.body_brief: Send a LinkedIn direct message from the mapped AE ({{ae.linkedin_sender_name}}) to the primary compliance contact ({{contact.full_name}}, {{contact.title}}). Message tone: peer-to-peer, concise, non-automated in feel. Copy framework: '{{contact.first_name}} — I wanted to reach out directly because {{account.name}}'s {{account.compliance_program_name}} verification has now been lapsed for {{compliance.days_since_expiry}} days, and I know {{account.linked_hiring_client_names}} depend on your verified status. I don't want you to lose those contracts over something we can fix quickly. I can personally walk you through the renewal in one short call — [calendar link: {{ae.calendar_link}}] — or if you'd rather just do it yourself, here's your direct renewal link: {{renewal_portal.prefill_url}}. Let me know how I can help.' Cap message length at 300 characters for mobile readability. Do not include marketing disclaimers in the message body — handled by platform footer.
qa_rules: Suppress if renewal initiated or completed at any point before Day 21 send
Suppress if Account.Active_AE_Opportunity__c = true
Suppress if Contact.LinkedIn_Opt_Out__c = true
Suppress if ae.linkedin_sender_name resolves to null or AE LinkedIn seat is unconnected — route to CSM LinkedIn sender fallback
Hard-block if compliance.days_since_expiry < 21 at send time (data drift check)
Hard-block if account.linked_hiring_client_names is null — do not send without this anchor context
Validate contact.title is not a purely technical role (e.g., 'Software Engineer', 'IT Admin') — compliance/operations/safety titles only
Message body after token resolution must not exceed 300 characters — hard truncation block if over limit
Rate-limit: max 50 LinkedIn messages per sender per day (platform LinkedIn policy compliance)
touches.success_metric: LinkedIn message acceptance/reply rate ≥ 12%; AE-booked meeting rate ≥ 5% of Step 5 recipients within 7 days of send

optimization_triggers.condition: Contact opens Step 1 email AND clicks renewal portal CTA within 48 hours but does not complete renewal within 72 hours
optimization_triggers.action: Acceleration path: suppress Step 2 banner default timing; immediately surface in-app banner on next login session and simultaneously create low-priority AE awareness task — do not wait for Day 7 threshold

optimization_triggers.condition: Warehouse trait compliance.verification_status transitions to 'Active' (renewal completed) at any point during campaign runtime
optimization_triggers.action: Immediately suppress contact and account from all remaining touches; write Account.Compliance_Status__c = 'Active' back to Salesforce; trigger post-renewal onboarding nurture enrollment; log conversion event to pipeline_projection.realized_renewals counter

optimization_triggers.condition: Account.churn_risk_score crosses threshold ≥ 85 at any point (warehouse real-time update)
optimization_triggers.action: Escalate account to AE priority queue: create Salesforce Task with Priority = Critical and ActivityDate = today; pull account out of automated sequence; flag for manual AE outreach within 4 business hours; notify AE via Slack webhook

optimization_triggers.condition: Step 4 Variant A achieves click-to-initiation rate ≥ 10% by Day 16 cohort check (matches or exceeds Variant B performance)
optimization_triggers.action: Optimization agent reallocates remaining untouched Day 14 cohort 70/30 toward Variant A; update subject line bandit weights in platform; log reallocation event with timestamp for attribution audit

optimization_triggers.condition: AE task from Step 3 remains incomplete (Task.Status != 'Completed') for more than 48 business hours
optimization_triggers.action: Escalate task to AE manager (User.ManagerId) via Salesforce Chatter mention; re-assign task if no action within 72 hours to CSM overflow queue; log escalation in Account.Re_Engagement_Escalation_Log__c

optimization_triggers.condition: Three or more contacts on the same Account record engage (open or click) across Steps 1–4 but no renewal is initiated
optimization_triggers.action: Flag account as 'High Multi-Contact Intent'; create an AE Opportunity record in Salesforce with Stage = 'Renewal Discovery' and attach all engagement signals as Activity history; route to AE for consultative renewal assist within 1 business day

pipeline_projection.expected_renewals: ~101 account renewals (12% of 840 accounts); estimated ARR recovery of $1.2M–$1.6M assuming average Tier-2 ARR of ~$14,300/account; AE-assisted renewals projected at 30–35% of total conversions (30–35 accounts via Steps 3 & 5)
pipeline_projection.ae_efficiency: AE task volume capped at ~168 tasks (Step 3 triggers on ~20% of 840 accounts showing engagement signals); Step 5 LinkedIn outreach limited to churn_risk ≥ 70 non-responders (~200–250 contacts); total AE labor estimated at 140–180 hours across the quarter, compared to ~520 hours for fully manual outreach — efficiency gain of ~65%
pipeline_projection.campaign_runtime: 21-day active sequence per contact cohort; full campaign closes Day 28 (Day 21 final touch + 7-day reply/conversion window); reporting cadence: Day 7 (early signal review), Day 14 (variant selection), Day 21 (final push), Day 28 (pipeline close and retrospective)
pipeline_projection.downside: Downside scenario (probability ~25%): email deliverability degradation or compliance data sync lag reduces segment accuracy by 20–30%, limiting addressable pool to ~600 accounts. Engagement rates fall to Step 1 open rate ~18%, portal CTA click rate ~3.5%. Renewal conversion drops to 5–6% of addressable pool (~36 accounts), recovering ~$515K ARR. AE task volume remains constant but conversion from AE-assisted path also drops proportionally. Mitigation levers: (1) warm up sending domain 7 days pre-launch; (2) run warehouse-to-Salesforce compliance status reconciliation within 48 hours of campaign kick-off; (3) activate SMS channel as parallel Step 1 fallback for contacts with verified mobile numbers if email open rates fall below 15% at Day 3 check.

meta.campaign_name: Tier-2 Supplier Re-Engagement — Compliance Lapse → Renewal
meta.vertical: Supplier compliance & contractor safety SaaS — industrial enterprise (oil & gas, utilities, construction)
meta.objective: Reactivate Tier-2 supplier accounts whose compliance verification lapsed in the last 90 days, route engaged accounts to AE-qualified pipeline, and recover ~12% of dormant ARR within one quarter
meta.author: Senior MarOps Architect
meta.ab_test: Step 4 email — consequence-framing (Variant A) vs. frictionless-enablement (Variant B), split on prior engagement signal
